_doc: Launch original sectional — Seating Arrangement. Generated from computed templates; no competitor question text copied.

questions.stem_en: Five persons A, B, C, D, E sit in a row facing north. D sits at the left end. A sits immediately right of D. B sits immediately right of A. C sits immediately right of B. E sits at the right end. Who sits in the middle?
questions.stem_hi: पाँच व्यक्ति A, B, C, D, E north-facing row में बैठे हैं। D sits at the left end. A sits immediately right of D. B sits immediately right of A. C sits immediately right of B. E sits at the right end. Middle में कौन बैठा है?

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Picked a neighbouring position from the final row instead of the asked seat.
options.trap_reason_hi: Asked seat की जगह final row की neighbouring position चुन ली।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Reversed left and right even though all persons face north.
options.trap_reason_hi: सभी north face कर रहे हैं फिर भी left/right reverse कर दिया।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Used the clue order but stopped before placing all five persons.
options.trap_reason_hi: Clue order use किया पर सभी पाँच persons place करने से पहले रुक गए।

questions.explanation_method_en: Final order left-to-right is D-A-B-C-E; middle seat is B. Therefore, answer = B.
questions.explanation_concept_en: For row seating facing north, the reader's left and the persons' left are the same. Write the final order before answering position questions. Final answer is B.
questions.explanation_method_hi: Final order left-to-right is D-A-B-C-E; middle seat is B. अतः answer = B।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: North-facing row में reader का left और persons का left same होता है। Position answer देने से पहले final order लिखें। Final answer B है।

questions.explanation_concept_en: For row seating facing north, the reader's left and the persons' left are the same. Write the final order before answering position questions. Final answer is P.
